title: Graceful worker deadline
description: Per-job graceful deadline (AI_JOB_DEADLINE_MS) in the durable AI worker: a job that outruns its time budget is routed to manual_review BEFORE the function is hard-killed, so it never strands in 'processing'.
rollbackSteps: Revert the sync commit; the deadline defaults are safe (env-overridable).
compatibilityNotes: Pure backend worker logic — no branding. Direct port; verify the downstream cron maxDuration is >= the deadline.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream worker hardening.
